title: Smoky Spicy Turkish Sirloin Kebabs
description: Spicy, smoky kebabs with tender sirloin, perfect for kids and ready for a quick family dinner.
instructions: Cut the sirloin into 1.5 cm cubes and set aside.
In a bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, smoked paprika, cumin, red pepper flakes, oregano, minced garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to create the marinade.
Add the steak cubes to the bowl, ensuring each piece is coated; cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes (up to 4 hours).
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat. If using a grill, lightly oil the grates to prevent sticking.
Thread the marinated steak cubes onto skewers, interspersing with red onion wedges.
Grill the kebabs for 2–3 minutes per side, or until the steak is cooked to your desired doneness, turning occasionally.
Remove the skewers from the grill and drizzle with a splash of olive oil.
Serve hot with a side of plain yogurt or tzatziki sauce and a piece of crusty bread.
Allow the kids to enjoy the smoky bite while parents can savor the aromatic spices.
